ffmpeg.notInstalledDesc: Video tools require FFmpeg support. Please install FFmpeg first and ensure it's in the system PATH.
ffmpeg.noEncoderDesc: FFmpeg is installed, but no available video encoder found (libx264/libx265/mpeg4).
ffmpeg.installHint: Please install a version of FFmpeg with complete encoders.

merge.title: Merge Videos
merge.dropHint: Drop video files here, or click 'Add'
merge.minFilesHint: At least two video files are required

images.title: Images to Video
images.dropHint: Drop folder here, or click to select

extract.title: Extract Frames
extract.dropVideoHint: Double-click or drop video file here

copy.label: Stream Copy
copy.tooltip: Copy video/audio data without re-encoding. Zero quality loss, fastest speed, but requires all input videos to have the same codec and resolution.

libx264.label: H.264
libx264.tooltip: Most widely compatible video codec, supported by almost all devices and players. Suitable for daily use.

libx265.label: H.265/HEVC
libx265.tooltip: Next-gen video codec, 30%-50% smaller files than H.264 at the same quality. Slower encoding, some older players don't support it.

ffv1.label: FFV1 Lossless
ffv1.tooltip: Mathematically lossless codec, no quality loss at all. Suitable for archiving and professional post-production. Files are very large (about 1/3 of original size), not suitable for daily playback.

libvpx-vp9.label: VP9
libvpx-vp9.tooltip: Open codec developed by Google, used with WebM format. Excellent quality but slower encoding.

mpeg4.label: MPEG-4
mpeg4.tooltip: Legacy codec with good compatibility but low compression efficiency. Only used as fallback when other codecs are unavailable.

high.label: High Quality
high.tooltip: CRF 18, visually lossless level, larger files, suitable for scenarios requiring extreme quality.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.tooltip: CRF 23, best balance between quality and file size, recommended for daily use.

fast.label: Fast
fast.tooltip: CRF 28, fast encoding speed, smaller files, suitable for preview or scenarios with lower quality requirements.
